_comment: Example reviewer registry. Copy to ~/.claude/reviewer-registry.json and edit for your codebase. The code-review formula reads this file at triage time and bonds one review-arm per matched specialist (plus all 'always' reviewers). Save as .example.json here; your real registry lives at ~/.claude/reviewer-registry.json and is not tracked by agent-teams.

conditional.focus: hook rules, dep arrays, stale closures, effect cleanup
OWASP top 10, secrets, auth bypass, input validation
algorithmic complexity, N+1 queries, memory, scalability
resource limits, security contexts, health probes, RBAC
layer caching, minimal base images, secrets in ENV, user permissions
actor isolation, MainActor, Sendable, Task lifecycle
goroutine leaks, channel misuse, mutex correctness, context propagation
type safety, async correctness, mutable defaults, import structure
